hooks.command: FAILED=0; HURL_FILES=$(find backend/tests/hurl -name '*.hurl' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$HURL_FILES" ] && { hurl --test backend/tests/hurl/*.hurl --variable base_url=http://localhost:8000 || FAILED=1; }; E2E_FILES=$(find frontend/e2e -name '*.spec.ts' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$E2E_FILES" ] && { (cd frontend && npx playwright test) || FAILED=1; }; [ $FAILED -eq 1 ] && exit 2; exit 0
